name: Stuffed Vine Leaves
recipeIngredient: 20 Good-sized canned vine or Grape leaves in brine
1/2 cup Lean beef, cooked and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the vine leaves. Place them in a saucepan of boiling water and blanch for 5 minutes. Drain well.
2. In a bowl, combine the beef, garlic, tomato paste, lemon juice, and cinnamon. Blend well. Stir in the rice, scallions, oregano, and parsley. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Lay the vine leaves on a clean, flat surface. Remove any stems without tearing the leaves.
4. Place a spoonful of stuffing on each leaf and gently press the stuffing together to make it compact. Fold in the sides of each leaf and roll up neatly. Arrange the rolls on a serving dish and garnish with shredded lettuce, if desired.
5. In a small bowl, blend the olive oil and wine vinegar well with a wire whisk. Sprinkle the rolls with the remaining parsley.
This dish: Dolmades
